description: CompositionGrey top with two parts, outer cardigan made of knitted 100% cotton, inner blouse-style front made of striped 58% cotton and 42% silk, two parts are joined at side seam, outer has long sleeves and a draped shawl neck, inner front has small mandarin collar, cross-over front gathered to two button fastening at centre front, brand tag at hem and inner fabric protruding from cardigan back hemFitRegularWash careWash at 30 degrees with similar colours inside outPull into shape after washingDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanIron lowAn extremely stylish option from s.oliver. The slouchy knitted cardigan coordinates beautifully with the subtly-striped feminine inner blouse. Two cute buttons in the centre provide a focus point surrounded by gathers while the wrap front is flattering to all body types.  Wear this when you want to look sophisticated without sacrificing comfort.Model statisticsThe product is a size 42 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
